name: Marinated Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Medium shrimp, cleaned and deveined,
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine olive oil, garlic, orange zest and juice, rosemary and pepper to taste.
2. Add shrimp and cover with marinade. Refrigerate for 1 hour.
3. Grill shrimp over low coals or under broiler 4 inches from source of heat until golden, 4-5 minutes, turning once.
Each serving shrimp contains about: 162 calories; 210 milligrams sodium; 188 milligrams cholesterol; 5 grams fat, 27% of calories from fat.
Each serving chicken contains about: 210 calories; 111 milligrams sodium; 59 milligrams cholesterol; 7 grams fat, 30% of calories from fat.
